prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

vulnerablePopulations: people with homelessness and social vulnerability
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria with structured assessment; early psychosis services common in many countries

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; early psychosis referral pathways in many systems
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to antipsychotics, long-acting injectables, and psychosocial services; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Early intervention services and structured psychiatric pathways common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Antipsychotics with psychosocial rehabilitation; long-acting injectables used for adherence support; integrated community services in many systems
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Service variability and social determinants impacting outcomes
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: High access to evidence-based pharmacotherapy and community mental health services in many member states
